text: I feel a sense of anticipation, as if I've entered a space devoted to learning and innovation. The clean, modern design and abundance of light suggest clarity of purpose, yet the emptiness of the room hints at unrealized potential—ideas waiting to be discussed and brought to life. The bold 'R+D' signage and interactive displays inspire curiosity and introspection about the intersection of human creativity and technology. I feel both invited to explore and somewhat awed by the possibilities that surround me.
